overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk nightclub interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit bar areas, a vending machine corridor, and a grungy bathroom with a dead body. The player walks through red and green-lit corridors, inspects the body, and returns to the main area.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit bar corridor overlooking dance floor

events.description: slows down to examine the cluttered bar counter with broken bottles and debris
turns away from the bar area toward the vending machine corridor

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the bar counter, observing the neon-lit club interior through the windows

entered.detail: large cursive neon sign spelling 'Kiss' in pink and yellow
long counter with green bottles, glasses, and scattered debris
large windows looking out into a multi-level club with neon lighting
illuminated advertisement screens on the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The player explores a narrow corridor with a bar counter on the right, neon signs glowing pink and red, and large windows revealing a busy club interior. The camera moves slowly, examining the cluttered bar surface before turning toward a darker corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with vending machines and digital advertisements

events.description: opens green metal door and enters the bathroom with yellow fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor past illuminated vending machines and patterned wallpaper toward a door

entered.detail: illuminated 'Insta-Food' vending machines with colorful product displays
green and gold paisley patterned wallpaper covering the corridor walls
tall green plants in corners with purple neon accent lighting at base
dark green metal doors with silver handles at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrower corridor with green and gold patterned wallpaper, passing vending machines and potted plants. The lighting shifts from red neon to cooler green tones as the player approaches and opens a door to a bathroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: grungy bathroom with body and sink area

events.description: crouches down to inspect the dead body lying in the bathroom stall
stands up from the body and turns to examine the bathroom sinks and mirrors

agents.ego_description: crouching over a dead body to inspect it, then standing and looking around the bathroom interior

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down in red top near a bathroom stall

entered.detail: dark wooden bathroom stall doors with graffiti
corpse lying on checkered floor in a pool of blood near the stalls
black and white checkered tile flooring
long beige counter with multiple sinks and large mirrors above
harsh yellow fluorescent light fixtures above the mirrors
walls covered in black graffiti tags and scribbles

segments.scene_description: Inside a grimy bathroom with yellow fluorescent lighting, the player discovers a dead body near the stalls and crouches to inspect it. The scene features checkered floors, graffiti-covered walls, and a row of sinks with harsh overhead lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: return corridor leading back to bar area

events.description: exits the bathroom back into the green-lit vending machine corridor
re-enters the red neon bar area from the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking back out of the bathroom through the corridor toward the main bar area

entered.detail: re-entering view as the player exits the bathroom
green paisley wallpaper visible again in the corridor
red neon bar area becoming visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player exits the bathroom, returning through the green-lit corridor with vending machines, and approaches the red neon glow of the bar area. The lighting transitions from yellow back to green and finally to red as the player completes the circuit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit club bar into a grimy utility area before returning to the main lounge. It begins by gliding past a cluttered bar counter under glowing pink and red signs, moving slowly through a narrow corridor that overlooks the busy interior. As the camera pushes forward, the atmosphere shifts from red neon to cooler green tones, passing patterned wallpaper and vending machines before opening a door into a bathroom. The scene then transitions into a harsh, yellow-lit space with checkered floors and graffiti-covered walls, where the camera crouches to inspect a dead body near the stalls. Finally, the camera retreats from the grime, moving back through the green-lit corridor as the lighting gradually returns to the warm red glow of the bar area.
